entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS451) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES:
1. TO ADD FIFTEEN (15) QUIKTRON SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS PRESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2197.01E.
2. TO ADD TWO (2) FORTINET SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2201.01E.
3. TO ADD TOLL FREE SERVICE CLINS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2165.01E.
4. TO ADD CO-LOCATED HOSTING SERVICE (CHS), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2199.01E.
5. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS BY SWC, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2202.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS452) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES:
1. TO ADD SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS AS PRESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2164.01E.
2. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.
3. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS454) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: ADDITION OF CLIN FOR INTERNET PROTOCOL SERVICE DOMESTIC PORT, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2181.02E. 2. ADDITION OF ONE (1) SYN-APPS, TWO (2) TRIPP-LITE SEDS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2193.02E. 3. ADDITION OF ADDS TWENTY-SIX (26) CISCO SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN AE2203.01E. 4. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 5. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS456) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. TO ADD THREE (3) VBRICK SEDS TO THE NBIP-VPNS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2208.01E.
2. TO ADD SEVEN (7) CISCO SEDS TO THE NBIP-VPNS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2210.01E.
3. TO ADD EIGHT (8) CISCO SEDS TO THE NBIP-VPNS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2216.01E.
4. TO ADD IPS DOMESTIC PORT PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2218.01E.
5. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS PRICE AT THE SWC LOCATION, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2209.01E.
6. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS PRICE AT THE SWC LOCATION, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2219.01E.
7. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS PRICE AT THE SWC LOCATION, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2220.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS458) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADDITION OF, NON-DOMESTIC NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL-VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE PORT PRICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2200.01E. 2. ADDITION OF DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS 7 AND 8MBPS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2215.02E. 3. ADDITION OF 2GBPS MANAGED TRUSTED INTERNET PROTOCOL SERVICE PORT, AS DETAILED IN AE2225.01E. 4. ADDITION OF PORT PRICE FOR NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL-VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE CLIN, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2228.01E. 5. ADDITION OF THIRTEEN (13) CISCO SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL-VIRUTAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2229.01E. 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS459) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES:
1. TO ADD 50 MBPS DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET PRICE AT THE SELECTED SWC LOCATION, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2233.01E.
2. TO ADD EIGHT (8) CISCO SEDS TO THE NBIP-VPNS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2234.01.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS460) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. PRICE INCREASE OF SEVENTY-SEVEN (77) CISCO SEDS SUPPORTING NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROCOTOL-VIRTUAL PRIVATE NEWTOWRK SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2178.02P. 2. ADDITION OF SED MMRC SUPPORTING NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2235.01S. 3. ADDITION OF ONE (1) AXWAY AND FOUR (4) F5 NETWORKS SEDS SUPPORTING NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROCOTOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN AE2236.02E. 4. ADDITION OF ONE (1) RIVERBED, THREE (3) JUNIPER AND TWO (2) CISCO SEDS FOR NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROCOTOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2238.01E. 5. ADDITION OF ONE (1) DELL SED TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL-VIRUTAL PRIVATE NETWORK SREVICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2239.01E. 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS461) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES:
1. TO ADD EIGHT (8) CUSTOMER SPECIFIC DESIGN AND ENGINEERING SERVICES (CSDES) INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) NON RECURRING CHARGE (NRC) PRICES AND RECURRING CHARGE (MRC) PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2183.02E.
2. TO ADD TWO (2) VMWARE SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2250.01E.
3. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS BY SWC, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2237.01E.
4. TO REDUCE EXISTING NBIP-VPNS CLINS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2246.01P.
5. TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS PRICE AT THE SWC LOCATION, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2252.01E.
6. TO ADD ONE (1) NON DOMESTIC (NONDOM) LAYER 2 VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORKS (L2VPNS) PORT (2 MBPS) UNDER CLIN 843051 (MRC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2212.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS463) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES:
1. TO ADD MNS FEATURE PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2248.01E.
2. TO ADD 2 VALCOM SEDS TO THE NBIP-VPNS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2263.02E.
3. TO ADD NEW PORT CLIN, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2267.01E.
4. TO ADD 10 HP SEDS TO THE NBIP-VPNS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2268.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
